zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills於1624年出生在英國坎布利其爾索韓姆。她於1646年與Edward Hills在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1703年10月在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills于1624年出生在英国坎布利其爾索韓姆。她于1646年与Edward Hills在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1703年10月在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆。

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills was born in 1624, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England. She married Edward Hills in 1646, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in October 1703, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills est née en 1624, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Edward Hills en 1646, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1703, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills wurde 1624 in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1646 in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Edward Hills geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1703 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills è nata il nel 1624 nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, England. Lei sposato Edward Hills nel 1646, nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1703, nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hillsは1624年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムで生まれた。1646年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムでEdward Hillsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1703年10月にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills(은)는 1624년 영국 캄브리지실르 소함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1646년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에서 Edward Hills(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1703년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills nasceu em 1624, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Edward Hills em 1646, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1703, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Rebeckah Hills родилась в 1624 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Hills в 1646 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1703 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.
